rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF SAMUEL LEWIS SIMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Conservatorship [Due To Death]
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Since the conservatee died in October 2021, the conservator has not filed a petition to terminate this conservatorship with a final report on waiver of account. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 11th Amended General Order which took effect on 04/25/2022 and LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: ** TRANSFERRED TO SOLANO COUNTY** CONSERVATORSHIP OF PATRICIA HOWARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Compel Conservatee'S Spouse To Report Community Property; For Reimbursement To Conservator; And To Apply Income And Principal Of Community Property For Support And Maintenance Of Conservatee
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The conservatee's spouse having the management and control of their community property has not filed a current income and expense declaration (FL-150 form) and a current property declaration (FL-160 form) required by Probate Code section 3084. At the last hearing, the conservatee's spouse was directed to file those forms by 05/18/2022. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 11th Amended General Order which took effect on 04/25/2022 and LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL LARRY MCLEAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/11/22. No courtesy copies. No proposed order. No proof of service of Notice of Petition to Administer Estate. No proof of publication. No Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities. No Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S). A cursory review of the petition online indicates that it is incomplete at items 3c, 3g(2)(a), 5(a)(2), and item 8. When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.18 C.] Who were the parents and when did they die? Item 6f is not the first box that applies if the petitioner was the decedent's brother. No waivers of bond have been filed. Courtesy copies of the petition and all other supporting papers plus the proposed order must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 6/30/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
